titleStmt.title: SII 15.547: original edition by P. B. Desai, Dines Chandra Sircar and G. S. Gai
No. 547. (B.K. No. 3 of 1926-27.) GADAG, GADAG TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a slab built into the prākāra of the Trikūṭēśvara temple.
This is dated Śaka 1107, Krōdhi, the other details being lost. The date corresponds to 1184-85 A.D., the Śaka year being current.

It records a gift to the god Trikūṭēśvara. It mentions Ereguppe in Huligeṟe Three Hundred. Mention is also made of Hermāḍirāya, probably of the Chālukya family and Chandrabhūshaṇamuni. The record is fragmentary and damaged.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
dāṁbudhō
ta¨rkkasiddhāṁtavidha koppina
munīśaṁ brahmapuri ta budha brātra
sūranudghamahipuṁ hulkuṁṭeyaṁ
kyatiḷakaṁ ha¨rmmāḍirāyaṁ vitatakhyāti ya
¨ryyanunnatavidyābheraṇabratīṁdranasadaṁ saiddhāntikāgrēsaraṁ .
gamavā¨rddhiyāde vidyābharaṇabratīṁdranesedaṁ trikūṭēśvaradoḷa�
ne dhara dākṣiṇyada nidhiyane budhāḷigaḷa bageva¨rkkāruṇyāvani
bhavānurāgamanīguṁ . varaśabdāgamakāvyavāgama siddhā
daṁtoppuka . Ā mahāsthānakkāsthānavastunāyakaṁ
māda duṣṭanigraha viśiṣṭapratipāḷanava geyyu � samastadha¨rmmaṁ
dēvaraṁgabhōgaraṁgabhōgamumaṁ vidyādānāṁnadānamumakkeṁdā dēva¨rgge muṁ
māḷpa saṁkaḷpadiṁ sakanṛpakālākrāṁtasaṁvatsaraśataṁgaḷu 1107 neya krōdhi
prakṣāḷana dhārāpū¨rvvakaṁ sa¨rvvabādhāparihāra sa¨rvvanamasyamācaṁdrā¨rkkasthā
risahitaṁ . Aṁtā huligeṟemūnūṟaṟoḷag� Ereguppeyumaṁ baḷvola mū
pū¨rvvama¨ryyādeyalli yareguppege . sirimānyaṁ manayi¨rppaṁ talli habuge
neṇbatā dereguppe nadhipaṁ śrīmattrikōṭēśvaraṁ . praṇu
hāraṁ teṟe nānāsaṁthe dhānyōtkaraṁ guṇadiṁdaṁ samabhāgavāge ga[¨r]dugaṁ kāvaṁ tri
tiṟuvar . A negaḷda vṛttiya¨rddhade dīnānātha¨rgga vārisatra vidyādāna śivārādhane
ni¨rmmisidanī vivēkabrahmaṁ . Ādeṁtane . sthiravene nīḷda kōṭeyaga
manavoppa māḍisidanī puramaṁ muniva[¨rga] bhūṣaṇaṁ . teṁgina
celvigeḍeyāytu tatpurada ramyavanaṁ jagadēkapā vanaṁ . pāḍuva
pūgoḷaṁ puradānaṁdanadoḷkaramoppi tōṟuguṁ . va
parama patibratāvatiyaraṁganeya[¨rssaka]ḷāgamānvi ta¨rgguru marudagni vipra�
¨rppi tōṟuguṁ . muninikarabudhaprakaravāśritavṛṁdava nāthakōṭisajjana�tiya¨rtthisaṁ
riḷātaḷāgradoḷ . munigaḷvaṁni viḷāmarapratati gaḷvaṁniṁ budha¨rvvanivanaṁ nimittaṁ
deyiradeṁnade pogasaṁnade[ṁ Aṁṭeye]nadoḍeyaṁ
� taṁdu sukhōṣṇa�nippa nī¨rgaḷaṁ tāveṟeyutta mi¨rppa varinutsavadiṁ
śrī tikūṭēśvarālayake biṭṭī dha¨rmmamaṁ dha¨rmma tatpararā¨rppāliparaṁta�[¨rgga]
ṣaṣṭiṁ ¨rṣasahasāṇi visṭāyāṁ jāyatē krimiḥ . dānaṁ vā sālanaṁ vēti
. yasya yasya yadā bhūmistasya tasya tadā phalaṁ . sāmānyōyaṁ dha¨rmmasē
macaṁdaḥ © Apratihatapratāpaḥ . prabhu maṁtrō haśaktisaṁpannaḥ
rājō bhōjadēvaparājitaḥ . samantatō vidyudiva sphuranti
. tēna yanmū¨rdhni murārikēśava camūpālēna śatrō
¨rmmalāmācā¨ryyaḥ vṛticaṁdrabhūṣaṇamuniḥ kārayat .
Digital edition of SII 15.547 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
